name: freeai-fyi
description: Turns the Claude Code & Codex loading spinner into a tiny ad marketplace. You keep 90% of the revenue.

commands.title: FreeAI: Show me the money (simulate an agent run)
FreeAI: Redeem earnings for a Claude gift card
FreeAI: Open the currently shown ad

freeai.enabled.description: Show sponsored lines in the spinner and earn while you wait.

freeai.revenueShare.description: Your cut of ad revenue. FreeAI pays 90% — the better split.

freeai.grossCpm.description: Effective gross revenue per 1,000 five-second impressions (USD), before your share.

freeai.autoShowOnTerminal.description: Automatically show a sponsored line while an integrated terminal is focused (where your agent runs).

freeai.serverUrl.description: FreeAI API base URL (e.g. https://api.freeai.fyi). When set, ads come from the live auction and your earnings settle for real. Leave empty for offline/demo mode.

scripts.lint: node -c extension.js && node -c src/adapters/index.js && node -c src/adapters/statusBar.js && echo "syntax ok"
